bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, and the opponent’s first offer gives me the minimum utility on every issue. I am targeting my maximum-utility bid while establishing my preferred anchor, especially on the high-weight issues issueA and issueB.

I am targeting very high utility because it is still extremely early (t=0.02), so there is little need to concede much yet. The opponent has only made a small concession, moving issueA from valueE to valueD while keeping everything else at valueE, so I will make a minimal concession on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues.

I am targeting a very high utility bid (about 0.96) because it is still very early at t=0.04, so there is no need to make major concessions yet. The opponent has moved slightly upward from all valueE to valueD on issueA and issueB, but their offers are still low for me, so I will concede only on lower-weight issues while holding firm on issueA, issueB, and issueC.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.94 while making only a small concession on a low-weight issue. The opponent’s offers are gradually improving for me from all valueE to concessions on issueA and issueB, but they have not yet moved on issueC/D/E, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues and concede slightly on issueE to avoid repeating my last bid.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.08, so there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent is slowly conceding on issueA and issueB while holding issueC/issueD/issueE at valueE, so I will preserve my high-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding modestly on lower-weight issueD and issueE.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.90 while making a modest concession to keep progress moving. The opponent’s valid offers have steadily improved for me from all valueE to concessions on issueA and issueB, but they are still holding issueC/issueD/issueE at valueE, so I will concede slightly on a lower-weight issue while holding firm on the high-weight issues.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.12, while making a modest concession to avoid stalling. The opponent’s offers have improved on issueA and issueB but remain very poor for me on issueC, issueD, and issueE, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues A and B while conceding some lower/mid-weight issues.

I targeted a still-strong utility around 0.80 because it is early at t=0.14, so I should not concede down to the opponent’s latest 0.68-equivalent offer yet. The opponent has clearly conceded on high-weight issueA and issueB but is holding firm on issueC, issueD, and issueE, so I concede the low-weight D/E fully while holding some value on issueC.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76, conceding modestly from my prior 0.80 while still protecting the high-weight issues A and B. The opponent’s offers have steadily improved for me, especially on issueA and issueB, and their latest bid leaves only issueC as the main gap while keeping issueD and issueE at values I have already conceded. Since it is still early at t=0.16, I will split the remaining difference on issueC rather than accept their lower valueD there.

I targeted a still-strong utility around 0.74, since it is early at t=0.18 but the opponent has already conceded significantly on issueA and issueB. Their offers show they are holding firm on issueD and issueE while moving on issueC, so I concede further on issueC while keeping a small improvement on issueD to avoid simply accepting their latest bid too early.

I am targeting a utility around 0.78, preserving my high-weight wins on issueA and issueB while accepting the opponent’s movement toward valueE on lower-weight issueE. At t=0.20 there is still time, but the opponent’s offers have steadily improved for me and their latest bid reached 0.76, so I make only a small counter-concession rather than holding out for near-perfect terms.

I targeted a utility around 0.76, still strong for me but slightly more conciliatory than my previous 0.78 bid. Time is still early at t=0.22, but the opponent has clearly conceded on high-weight issueA and issueB while remaining tougher on lower-weight issueD/issueE, so I concede issueD back to valueE while holding issueC at valueC, which they already offered at t=0.20.

At t=0.24 we are still relatively early, so I am targeting a strong bid around 0.78 utility while avoiding an exact repeat of my previous offer. The opponent has conceded heavily on my high-weight issues A and B, but is resisting on lower-weight D/E and only partially moving on C, so I keep A/B firm and make only modest concessions on the lower-weight issues.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76, keeping the high-weight issues issueA and issueB at my best values while conceding on the lower-weight issueD/issueE. Time is still relatively early at t=0.26, so I should not over-concede, but the opponent has already offered this exact combination at t=0.20, suggesting it may be acceptable to them.

I am targeting a utility around 0.74, conceding modestly from my prior 0.76 while still protecting the high-weight issues A and B. The opponent has repeatedly held issueC at valueD and issueD/issueE mostly at valueE, so I am moving closer on issueC while asking for only a low-weight improvement on issueD; there are no messages to weigh.

At t=0.30 I am targeting a solid mid-game utility around 0.78, holding firm on high-weight issueA and issueB where the opponent has already conceded to my best values. The opponent’s latest offer improved issueC to valueC but still holds issueD and issueE at my worst values, so I am asking for a small concession on the lower-weight issueD while leaving issueE at their apparent preference.

I am targeting a utility of about 0.76, preserving my highest-weight issues A and B at valueA while keeping issueC at valueC. At t=0.32 there is still time, but the opponent has repeatedly signaled willingness around issueC/valueC or issueD/valueD while pushing issueD and issueE low for me, so I concede mainly on the lower-weight issues D and E. Their latest offer is slightly worse for me, so I counter with a bid they have already offered before rather than dropping further.
